title: Fit test - Successfully completing the Fit Test
scenario: Successfully complete the Fit Test with connected earbuds and verify "This is a good fit!" message, "Good" tags, and "Done" button appear, then return to Device Home Screen.
steps: Open the app with Osprey/Tern/Emu connected and correctly positioned in the ears.
Go to Device Settings > Fit Test.
Start and successfully complete fit test.
expected: "This is a good fit!" appears on screen; both earbuds marked with icon and "Good" tag; "Done" button displayed. After tapping "Done", user is returned to Device Home Screen (or Onboarding if triggered during Onboarding).
